title: phlomoides ariana
intro: Phlomoides ariana, also known as Ariana's Phlomoides, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a type of perennial herb that grows in the mountainous regions of Iran and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Phlomoides ariana include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating infections. The herbal preparations of Phlomoides ariana include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
